description:
Build or document the staff workflow for answering launch support and compliance evidence questions using minimal records.

**Scope**
- Provide a staff-only view or runbook that can assemble a timeline from DynamoDB evidence records, consent records, MDI/Stripe pointers, and provider dashboards.
- Gate any staff surface with strong auth/role checks and audit every access.
- Do not decrypt or display questionnaire answers, message bodies, files, labs, or clinical notes in Apoth.

**Acceptance**
- Staff can answer "where is this patient in onboarding/care/billing?" using opaque IDs and statuses.
- Every staff timeline view/export is itself recorded as an evidence event.
- Non-staff users cannot access the workflow.
title: Staff support/evidence timeline over minimal records
